summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Flexible Per-Date Technician Availability feature. All 10 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI is fully functional with all requested features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test data generated using /api/jobs/generate-weekly endpoint which creates technicians and per-date availability records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Flexible per-date technician availability feature is complete and working. Key endpoints: /api/jobs/generate-weekly (creates availability), /api/technicians/availability/by-date/{date} (get per-date data), /api/technicians/availability/{id} (toggle availability). UI at /weekly shows calendar strip with technician counts per day, Technicians tab shows Available/Day Off sections with shift details.

tested_features.feature: Generate weekly data endpoint creates technician availability records
tested_features.details: POST /api/jobs/generate-weekly creates 84 availability records (12 technicians x 7 days)

tested_features.feature: Weekly summary includes available_technicians count per day
tested_features.details: GET /api/jobs/weekly-summary returns available_technicians and total_technicians for each day

tested_features.feature: Availability by date endpoint returns correct technician schedules
tested_features.details: GET /api/technicians/availability/by-date/{date} returns full shift details per technician

tested_features.feature: Technicians available on weekdays vs weekends (fewer on weekends)
Toggle technician availability via PUT endpoint
Weekly planning page shows technician count in calendar strip
tested_features.details: Calendar strip shows blue number indicating available technicians per day

tested_features.feature: Technicians tab displays Available and Day Off sections
tested_features.details: UI shows 'Available (N)' and 'Day Off (M)' sections with technician lists

tested_features.feature: Each technician shows shift name and time window
tested_features.details: Shows shift names (Early/Day/Late/Standard) with times (e.g., 07:00 AM - 03:00 PM)

tested_features.feature: Clicking different days updates technician list
tested_features.details: Day selection triggers fetchDayData() which updates availability display

tested_features.feature: Optimize uses only available technicians for that date
tested_features.details: POST /api/optimize?date={date} filters technicians by is_available=True for that specific date

screenshots: .screenshots/weekly_plan_weekend.png - Weekend view with fewer available techs
